sessionStart.bash: echo '{"additionalContext":"RepoWise-first: before any codebase task, gather context from RepoWise first. Tier 1: RepoWise MCP graph tools (the \"RepoWise MCP for Pulse360\" MCP server; tools: find_symbol, get_symbol, get_impact, find_callers, find_references, batch_query) and LSP tools (lsp_definition, lsp_references, lsp_hover) for symbol resolution and blast radius. Tier 2: repowise-context/ files, starting with repowise-context/project-overview.md. Tier 3: native file search only when tiers 1-2 do not cover the question. If these tools are deferred in your environment, load them via tool search before calling."}' # repowise-managed
sessionStart.powershell: echo '{"additionalContext":"RepoWise-first: before any codebase task, gather context from RepoWise first. Tier 1: RepoWise MCP graph tools (the \"RepoWise MCP for Pulse360\" MCP server; tools: find_symbol, get_symbol, get_impact, find_callers, find_references, batch_query) and LSP tools (lsp_definition, lsp_references, lsp_hover) for symbol resolution and blast radius. Tier 2: repowise-context/ files, starting with repowise-context/project-overview.md. Tier 3: native file search only when tiers 1-2 do not cover the question. If these tools are deferred in your environment, load them via tool search before calling."}' # repowise-managed
